response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song from lyrics 'Tame the fire and fall before my Justice'. 2. Identified the song as 'RENEGADE' by Hololive English -Justice-. 3. Used the search tool to verify the title and artist, and to retrieve the full lyrics. 4. Mapped scenes based on visual and audio cues. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the requested structure and escaped lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting followed by a full vocal performance of the original song 'RENEGADE' by Hololive English -Justice-, performed by various Hololive English VTubers, followed by a talk segment.

scenes.description: The performers wave and greet the audience.
Musical performance of the song 'RENEGADE' by Hololive English -Justice-. Performers dance. The song title 'RENEGADE' appears on screen.
